components.name: worker
components.description: Core Worker class: job polling loop, coroutine execution, health-check, and cron scheduling.

components.name: jobs
components.description: Job data structures (JobDef, JobResult, JobStatus enum), serialisation and deserialisation helpers.

components.name: cron
components.description: CronJob definition and next_cron datetime calculator for scheduled jobs.

components.name: constants
components.description: Redis key prefixes and default configuration values shared across modules.

components.name: utils
components.description: Time conversion helpers (to_ms, ms_to_datetime), import_string, truncate, and poll async generator.

components.name: connections
components.description: ArqRedis (Redis subclass with job enqueue API), RedisSettings dataclass, create_pool factory, and Sentinel support.

components.name: cli
components.description: Click CLI entrypoint; delegates to worker.run_worker and worker.check_health. Optional file-watch mode via watchfiles.

external_systems.name: Redis
external_systems.description: Primary data store for queues and results.

relationships.description: Deserialises job payloads and writes JobResult on completion.
Uses CronJob and next_cron to schedule timed function executions.
References Redis key prefixes for queue, in-progress, and result keys.
Uses poll generator for job polling loop and time helpers.
Imports JobDef and serialisation helpers for job enqueue.
Uses key prefixes for queue and result keys.
Calls run_worker, create_worker, and check_health from cli entrypoint.
Sends ZADD (enqueue) and GET (result fetch) commands.
Polls ZRANGEBYSCORE, atomically claims via WATCH/MULTI, writes results via SET.
